channel.title: AI Research Wire
channel.description: AI research notes, news synthesis, paper-style essays, and research digests.

item.title: AI Research Wire Manifesto
item.description: A first-principles blueprint for a static, citation-first AI research publication that agents can update through pull requests.

item.title: Frontier Model Release Watch
item.description: A living digest format for tracking new model launches, benchmark claims, system cards, pricing changes, and early production signals.

item.title: From Paper to Product: The Agentic Research Loop
item.description: How to turn papers into reproducible notes, implementation checklists, and product hypotheses without losing the original evidence trail.
